findings.evidence: Mathlib grep: `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ConcreteCategory/Forget.lean:113: instance ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory.hasForget₂ (P : ObjectProperty C) : HasForget₂ P.FullSubcategory C`, and `:136: def HasForget₂.trans`; PR lines 127-135 reimplements that inclusion and its composition manually.
findings.fix: Remove this instance and rely on `inferInstanceAs <| HasForget₂ (ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory _) _`; define `hasForgetToSemimoduleCat` via `HasForget₂.trans (FGComoduleCat R C) (ComoduleCat R C) (SemimoduleCat R)`.
findings.issue: `hasForgetToComoduleCat` is a special-case duplicate of the general `ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory.hasForget₂`; this adds overlapping API for every `FGComoduleCat` ambient forgetful functor.

summary: The finite-comodule API is mostly at the expected level, but the ambient forgetful instance duplicates Mathlib’s general full-subcategory instance instead of reusing it.
